results.title: Certification for cycle-friendly campuses introduced
results.description: NEW DELHI, JUN 4 (PTI): The Sports Ministry on Thursday said it has introduced a certification system for cycle-friendly institutions or cycle-only campuses and the likes of National Defence Academy(NDA) and the Indian Military Academy will be felicitated for their “sustainable mobility practices” here on Sunday.The felicitation will take place during the ‘Sundays on Cycle’ [...] The post Certification for cycle-friendly campuses introduced first appeared on Nagaland Post .
results.source: Nagaland Post - Get The Latest Nagaland News, Brea
